name: Credit Professional Services - Credit Score Fix
description_short: Unable to verify. Website returns 403 Forbidden error, preventing access to company information, services, and operational details.
description_long:
Credit Professional Services - Credit Score Fix operates under the fix-my-credit category, positioning itself as a credit repair company based on its URL structure (creditprofessionalservices.com/credit-repair-oakland/). However, a complete company profile cannot be reliably constructed at this time. The website currently returns a 403 Forbidden error, which blocks access to all company information, service descriptions, pricing, credentials, and operational details necessary for accurate consumer guidance. This access restriction prevents verification of the company's actual service offerings, whether they focus on disputing credit report errors, negotiating with creditors, or other credit repair methodologies. Without accessible website content, claims about their specific processes, success rates, customer service quality, or business practices cannot be substantiated. The 403 error may indicate temporary server issues, intentional access restrictions, or structural problems with the website. Until the website becomes accessible, consumers cannot independently verify the company's legitimacy, licensing status, or service quality through their digital presence. Prospective customers should attempt to reach the company through alternative contact methods if available, or research independent reviews and regulatory records through the Federal Trade Commission, state attorney general offices, or the Better Business Bureau to assess credibility before engaging services.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.
